svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="system" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-764" dy="-200" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1480" pageHeight="860" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="gusher.cluster 系統架構（NATS,無 Redis）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1400" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="瀏覽器 client（WebSocket,雙向）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="120" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;" value="整合方／後端（REST 推播）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="1060" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="gusher slave 節點 ×N
持 ws 連線、本機驗 JWT、fan-out
（內嵌 redisocket 引擎）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="120" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="gusher master 節點
publish REST API、查詢在線/頻道
（無連線;查詢經 request/reply 匯總）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="340" x="1040" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="shape=hexagon;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;" value="NATS（單一後端）

bus:subject gusher.ch.<appKey>（節點只收訂閱的 channel）
presence:gusher.presence.query（request/reply 跨節點聚合,無 store）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="500" x="490" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="50" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;startArrow=classic;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="20" value="① ws 連線 + JWT
（auth/subscribe/push 命令）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="51" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="21" value="② POST /push/{app}/{channel}/{event}"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="52" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;startArrow=classic;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.15;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="30" value="subscribe gusher.ch.>
（收推播 → fan-out 給 client）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="53" edge="1" parent="1" source="21" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;startArrow=classic;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.85;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=11;" target="30" value="③ publish gusher.ch.<app>
＋ presence request/reply"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="90" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=13;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#333333;" value="連線層引擎為 redisocket.v2（Broker/Presence 抽象;NATS 後端）。master/slave 皆為無狀態節點,可水平擴展。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1240" x="120" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
